examples: The production of soy peptides by soy meal microorganism fermentation was studied with 30l fermentor.
The screening of polyoxin producing and anti_infect strains from fomite fermentor lots was introduced.
A set of solid state fermentation and airing system of two liters cylinder glass fermentor was established.
The husk, the outer covering of the barley grain, is placed in a bi-fermentor which transforms the cellulose into methane gas.
Even the waste from the waste is put to good use -- the waste from the bio-fermentor is used as a natural fertiliser in the barley fields.
